name: mission-execution-engine
description: Add mission plan execution, real-time progress tracking, report generation, and execution history to the missions system

milestones.name: mission-executor
milestones.description: Core execution engine that runs features with dependency ordering and pushes real-time status via WebSocket

milestones.name: mission-reporting
milestones.description: Structured mission reports with pass/fail assertions, duration, and web UI for execution view

milestones.name: execution-persistence
milestones.description: Persistent execution history store with replay and cross-session audit trail

features.description: FeatureRunner that executes a single feature: runs its expectedBehavior assertions, tracks pass/fail count, duration, and logs per-assertion results with timestamps
expectedBehavior: FeatureRunner.Execute runs all expectedBehavior assertions for a given feature
Each assertion result records pass/fail, actual output, and duration
FeatureRunner respects a configurable timeout per feature
FeatureRunner emits status change events that the WebSocket hub can broadcast

features.description: MissionOrchestrator that executes an entire PlanMission: resolves feature dependency order, runs features via FeatureRunner with parallel execution where possible, and updates mission-level status
expectedBehavior: MissionOrchestrator.Execute resolves a DAG of feature dependencies and runs them in topological order
Features with no interdependencies execute in parallel
A failed feature blocks dependents and marks them as blocked
Mission-level status transitions through running -> completed/failed as features complete
Orchestrator emits mission_status_changed events via WebSocket hub for each transition

features.description: Add GET /api/execute endpoint and WebSocket event types (feature_execution_update, mission_execution_update) with payloads for assertion results and progress. Update app.js dashboard to show a live execution view with per-feature progress bars and assertion status
expectedBehavior: POST /api/missions/{id}/execute triggers MissionOrchestrator.Execute in a goroutine and returns 202 Accepted
WebSocket broadcasts feature_execution_update with featureId, assertionResults, progress percentage
Dashboard UI shows an execution view with real-time per-feature status and assertion pass/fail indicators
Execution view updates without page reload using WebSocket events

features.description: MissionReportGenerator that produces a structured report after execution: overall pass/fail, per-feature summary, per-assertion detail, total duration, and timestamps. Add GET /api/missions/{id}/reports/{reportId} endpoint and reusable UI component to render reports
expectedBehavior: MissionReportGenerator produces a MissionReport with overall verdict, feature summaries, and assertion-level details
Report includes start/end timestamps and total duration for the mission and each feature
GET /api/missions/{id}/reports returns list of reports for a mission
GET /api/missions/{id}/reports/{reportId} returns a single report as JSON
Dashboard has a Reports tab showing all reports with pass/fail summary and drill-down

features.description: ExecutionStore that persists MissionReport to the missions store directory with JSON encoding. Add listing and retrieval by mission ID and execution timestamp. The store auto-creates its base directory on first write and handles concurrent writes safely
expectedBehavior: ExecutionStore.Save persists a MissionReport to disk as JSON under <store-dir>/executions/<missionId>/<timestamp>.json
ExecutionStore.ListByMission returns all execution reports for a mission sorted by timestamp descending
ExecutionStore.Get returns a single execution report by mission ID and execution timestamp
Base directory is auto-created on first write if it does not exist
Concurrent saves to the same mission do not corrupt data (mutex-protected)

features.description: CLI command ywai mission execute <name> that loads a plan, runs it via the orchestrator, and prints the report to stdout. Include --watch flag for live terminal updates
expectedBehavior: ywai mission execute <name> loads the plan, runs execution, prints summary report to stdout
ywai mission execute <name> --watch shows live progress with terminal spinner or progress bar
Command exits with code 0 on full success, 1 on any assertion failure
Help text is accessible via ywai mission execute --help
